_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of parallel and distributed computing concepts.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of distributed computing concepts relevant to data processing at scale, including data partitioning strategies, parallel execution models, fault tolerance mechanisms, data locality optimization, and the CAP theorem.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-019 (AI, cosine: 0.560), DA-K-006 (DA, cosine: 0.553).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.8/10 (raw 0.680). Shared vocabulary: [computing, concepts, distributed, knowledge, parallel].

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.921 (P=0.965, R=0.881). P exceeds R by 0.084 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 28 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Knowledge of parallel and distributed computing concepts." and "Knowledge of distributed computing concepts relevant to data processing at scale" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.747 > STS 0.680 (gap +0.067). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [computing, concepts, distributed, knowledge, parallel] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 26.9%. Shared tokens: [computing, concepts, distributed, knowledge, parallel]. DCWF-only: []. WIDAI-only: [cap, data, execution, fault, locality, mechanisms].
